name: Africa's Talking
description: Africa's Talking — Unified communications API for SMS, voice, USSD, and mobile data across African markets.

seo.title: Africa's Talking — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Africa's Talking: Africa's Talking — Unified communications API for SMS, voice, USSD, and mobile data across African markets.

when_to_use: USSD-based mobile banking for unbanked African users
SMS OTP authentication across African markets
Voice IVR for agricultural advisory services
Bulk SMS campaigns for East African retail brands
Mobile data bundles API for telco app integrations

pros: Deep carrier integrations across 20+ African markets
USSD support that most global CPaaS skip
Airtime and mobile-data APIs beyond messaging
Sandbox and clear REST docs for SMB devs
cons: Dashboard UX feels dated and occasionally laggy
Delivery reports inconsistent on some local carriers
Pricing not always transparent across countries
Support response times vary by region
review.verdict: The default choice for SMS, USSD and airtime across Africa — coverage no global provider matches locally.
review.best_for: Fintech and civic apps targeting Sub-Saharan Africa with USSD and SMS
review.not_for: Teams needing WhatsApp-first workflows or premium global CPaaS tooling

lock_in.reason: Standard SMS/voice/USSD APIs, portable between providers

transparency.reason: Public per-message/minute pricing for each African market

developer_experience.reason: SDKs in Python, PHP, Node, Java; clear docs and sandbox
